title: Upgradeable Armors and Weapons
description: A datapack providing smithing recipes for upgrading gear
body:
### Have you ever found the ultimate piece of gear but it was golden?
### Well, with this datapack that won't be a nuisance anymore!
This datapack adds several new smithing recipes to upgrade your armor & weapons, made thinking to those who have found rare and non-transferable enchantments or stats bonuses (especialy modded ones) on low-tier items and want to take their gear to the next level.


<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

- Mods compatibility (suggestions accepted)
